---
title: "Mechanisms of Reading Comprehension: Curiosity, Executive Function, and Cross-Linguistic Transfer in Educational Media"
subtitle: "Working paper"
author: "with Anushka Ghosh"
description: "How curiosity, executive function, and cross-linguistic transfer drive learning from educational media."
categories: ["Skills & Learning", "Behavioral Economics"]
---

[SSRN](https://ssrn.com/abstract=5277125)
